name: shipglowz
description: ShipGlowz routes project-shipping work in Codex and prepares optional workflow packs.

interface.shortDescription: Route and package ShipGlowz workflows in Codex.
interface.longDescription: ShipGlowz is a Codex workflow layer for taking product work from request to verified outcome. This local alpha plugin provides the public entrypoint, pack catalog, and packaging audit needed to grow ShipGlowz without asking users to install many separate plugins.
defaultPrompt: $shipglowz help me choose the right workflow
